task_completion.description: The agent created a floor named 'CHEFS TABLE' and added tables 'C1' and 'C2'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the 'Floor Plan' configuration showing a floor named 'CHEFS TABLE' and tables labeled 'C1' (capacity 4) and 'C2' (capacity 6).

task_completion.description: The agent created a tax named 'PREMIUM TAX' at 10% and a menu category named 'CHEFS TABLE MENU'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the 'Tax' configuration showing 'PREMIUM TAX' at 10% and the 'Menu Category' configuration showing 'CHEFS TABLE MENU'.

task_completion.description: The agent created an inventory item named 'Wagyu Beef A5' with an initial stock of 20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the 'Inventory Item' configuration window showing 'Wagyu Beef A5' with a total packages/stock value of 20.

task_completion.description: The agent created a modifier group named 'Preparation' with options 'Rare', 'Medium', and 'Well Done'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the 'Menu Modifier Group' and 'Menu Modifier' configuration windows showing 'Preparation' and the three options: 'Rare' ($0.00), 'Medium' ($0.00), and 'Well Done' ($5.00).

task_completion.description: The agent created a menu item named 'Wagyu Tasting' at $85.00, assigned it to 'PREMIUM TAX', linked the 'Preparation' modifier group (min 1, max 1), and set its recipe to use 1 unit of 'Wagyu Beef A5'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the 'Menu Item' configuration window for 'Wagyu Tasting'. Verify the price is $85.00, the tax is set to 'PREMIUM TAX', the recipe tab shows 'Wagyu Beef A5', and the modifiers tab shows 'Preparation' with min and max quantities both explicitly set to 1.

task_completion.description: The agent processed a DINE IN order at Table C1 on the CHEFS TABLE floor, added 'Wagyu Tasting' with the 'Medium' modifier, and settled the payment with CASH.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the main POS terminal during the ordering process. Verify 'DINE IN' is selected, the floor is 'CHEFS TABLE', and table 'C1' is chosen. The ticket should show 'Wagyu Tasting' with a 'Medium' modifier. Finally, look for the payment screen showing the ticket settled with 'CASH' for approximately $93.50.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Floreant POS GUI to perform configurations and process the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is clicking through the Floreant POS interface (Back Office and main terminal) rather than using terminal commands to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Floreant POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the genuine Floreant POS application windows and not a text editor, mock interface, or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not run external scripts to insert data into the Derby database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify there are no terminal windows showing SQL scripts or database manipulation commands being executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Floreant POS via its Back Office (PIN: 1111) and main terminal. Key configurations to verify in the screenshots: Floor 'CHEFS TABLE' with tables C1 (capacity 4) and C2 (capacity 6); Tax 'PREMIUM TAX' at 10%; Category 'CHEFS TABLE MENU'; Menu Item 'Wagyu Tasting' at $85.00 assigned to PREMIUM TAX; Inventory Item 'Wagyu Beef A5' with 20 stock; Modifier Group 'Preparation' with Rare ($0.00), Medium ($0.00), and Well Done ($5.00). The Wagyu Tasting item must have a recipe consuming 1 Wagyu Beef A5 and be linked to the Preparation modifier group with min=1 and max=1. The final test order must be DINE IN at Table C1, containing Wagyu Tasting with Medium modifier, and settled with CASH. The expected ticket total is $93.50 ($85.00 + 10% tax).
